diagrams.title: Iterator Cursor Movement in ArrayList
diagrams.description: Shows how iterator traverses [A,B,C,D] element by element, with cursor position before each element
elements: hasNext() checks if cursor not at end
next() returns element and advances cursor
diagrams.purpose: Visualize iterator internal mechanics and understand why hasNext() must be checked before next()

diagrams.title: ListIterator Bidirectional Navigation
diagrams.description: Demonstrates ListIterator cursor movement in both directions with index positions
elements: Cursor at various positions: |A|B|C|D|, A|B|C|D|, A|B|C|D|, A|B|C|D|
Set replaces last element returned by next/previous
diagrams.purpose: Understand how ListIterator can move backwards and forwards, unlike one-directional Iterator
